zh.lifeSummary: 當Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole於0992年出生在挪威羅加蘭郡索拉時，她的父親Erling Skjalgsson Jarl, Earl of Sola, Norway17歲，母親Astrid Tryggvesdatter31歲。她和Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1060年在挪威姆奧 奧格 洛姆斯達爾吉斯可享年68歲，埋葬在挪威。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole于0992年出生在挪威羅加蘭郡索拉时，她的父亲Erling Skjalgsson Jarl, Earl of Sola, Norway17岁，母亲Astrid Tryggvesdatter31岁。她和Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1060年在挪威姆奧 奧格 洛姆斯達爾吉斯可享年68岁，埋葬在挪威。

nameMeanings.name: Ragnhild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + hildr ‘battle’.

variants.name: Ragnild
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + hildr ‘battle’.

nameMeanings.name: "Astrid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, derived from Old Norse áss ‘god’ + fríðr ‘fair, beautiful’. It came into use in the English-speaking world during the 20th century, influenced to some extent by Queen Astrid of the Belgians ( 1905–35 ).

nameMeanings.name: the
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothea  , also used independently.

historicEvents.title: Christianity to Norway
historicEvents.description: "King Olav Tryggvason and King Olav Haraldsson ""The Holy"" brought Christianity to Norway."

en.lifeSummary: When Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole was born in 0992, in Sola, Rogaland, Norway, her father, Erling Skjalgsson Jarl, Earl of Sola, Norway, was 17 and her mother, Astrid Tryggvesdatter, was 31. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske. She died in 1060, in Giske, Møre og Romsdal, Norway, at the age of 68, and was buried in Norway.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole est née en 0992, à Sola, Rogaland, Norvège, son père, Erling Skjalgsson Jarl, Earl of Sola, Norway, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Astrid Tryggvesdatter, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske. Elle est décédée en 1060, à Giske, Møre og Romsdal, Norvège, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Norvège.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole 0992 in Sola, Rogaland, Norwegen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Erling Skjalgsson Jarl, Earl of Sola, Norway 17 und ihre Mutter Astrid Tryggvesdatter 31. Sie hatte mit Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1060 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Giske, Møre og Romsdal, Norwegen und wurde in Norwegen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole è nata il nel 0992 nel Sola, Rogaland, Norvegia, sua padre, Erling Skjalgsson Jarl, Earl of Sola, Norway, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Astrid Tryggvesdatter, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske. Morì nel 1060, nel Giske, Møre og Romsdal, Norvegia, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Norvegia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Soleが0992年にノルウェーロガランドソラで生まれた時，父Erling Skjalgsson Jarl, Earl of Sola, Norwayは17歳，母Astrid Tryggvesdatterは31歳であった。彼女はTorberg Arnessen Arnung of Giskeとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1060年にノルウェームoア オグ ロムスダルギスクで68歳で死去し，ノルウェーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole(이)가 0992년 노르웨이 로갤란드 솔아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Erling Skjalgsson Jarl, Earl of Sola, Norway(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Astrid Tryggvesdatter(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1060년 노르웨이 o르 오그 롬즈다 지스크에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 노르웨이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole nasceu em 0992, em Sola, Rogaland, Noruega, seu pai, Erling Skjalgsson Jarl, Earl of Sola, Norway, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Astrid Tryggvesdatter, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske. Ela faleceu em 1060, em Giske, Møre og Romsdal, Noruega, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Noruega.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole родилась в 0992 г. в местности сола, рогаланд, Норвегия, её отцу по имени Erling Skjalgsson Jarl, Earl of Sola, Norway было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Astrid Tryggvesdatter, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske. Она умерла в 1060 г. в местности гиск, мoр ог ромсдаль, Норвегия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности Норвегия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ragnhild "Astrid the Årbårne" Erlingsdotter of Sole nació en 0992, en Sola, Rogaland, Noruega, su papá, Erling Skjalgsson Jarl, Earl of Sola, Norway, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Astrid Tryggvesdatter, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Torberg Arnessen Arnung of Giske. Murió en 1060, en Giske, Møre og Romsdal, Noruega, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Noruega.
